title: Music Matching App Profile Extensions
description: Additional profile fields specific to music-taste-based matching apps with streaming service integration.

matching_signals.title: Matching Signals
matching_signals.description: What data points are used for matching (e.g., 'top_artists', 'recently_played', 'genres', 'currently_playing')

match_card_detail_fields.title: Match Card Detail Fields
match_card_detail_fields.description: What information is shown on match cards (e.g., 'common_artists', 'common_tracks', 'music_compatibility_score')

spotify_share.title: Spotify User Share (%)
spotify_share.description: Percentage of users connected via Spotify (any tier)

apple_music_share.title: Apple Music User Share (%)
apple_music_share.description: Percentage of users connected via Apple Music

youtube_music_share.title: YouTube Music User Share (%)
youtube_music_share.description: Percentage of users connected via YouTube Music

premium_streaming_share.title: Premium Streaming Share (%)
premium_streaming_share.description: Percentage of users with a premium streaming subscription

listening_data_refresh_frequency.title: Listening Data Refresh
listening_data_refresh_frequency.description: How often the user's listening data is synced from the streaming service

room_matching_enabled.title: In-Room Matching Enabled
room_matching_enabled.description: Whether users can match with others in the same artist room

has_store.title: Has Rewards Store
has_store.description: Whether earned rewards can be spent in a store
